evidence_notes: Judged only catalog/owned_repair_batch69.json BOYSPR spar/stake buoy Chart No.1 parity repairs.

Used semantic_brief, s57_structure, chart1_parity_gate, repaired SVGs/renders, source_variant_matrix references, OpenCPN render refs where files or metadata were present, and S-101 references where present.

Pass requires a spar/stake vertical buoy body, not a can/cone/sphere, with load-bearing colour and band order preserved: BOYSPR04 white over orange; BOYSPR65 white over red; BOYSPR68 black over yellow; BOYSPR69 yellow over black.
BOYSPR05 has a conflicting human-readable yellow name, but S-57 COLOUR1, parsed semantic metadata, repaired SVG, and OpenCPN day render support white; this is recorded as a warning, not a failure.
Every Chart No.1 parity row records source_refs_used with chart1_crop:shape_spar_buoy. This artifact grants zero final approvals.
